name: Tamer Win Golf & Country Club
address: 3020 Niles Cortland Rd NE, Cortland, OH 44410
about: Tamer Win Golf & Country Club is a public golf facility in Cortland, Ohio, featuring 18 holes, a driving range, and a full-service golf shop. The venue includes indoor golf capabilities with a TrackMan simulator and a PuttView virtual green for year-round practice and play. It offers a comprehensive golf school, club fitting services, pro shop, and snack bar, catering to a wide range of golfers from beginners to serious players.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan simulator technology for accurate ball and club tracking
Custom club fitting services with PGA professional and demo equipment
Indoor golf leagues and full 18-hole simulator play options
Comprehensive junior golf programs and instructional classes
On-site golf shop with custom fitting and repair services

food_and_drink.notes: Bar service available in the facility

simulator_hardware.notes: Premier ball and club tracking radar for simulator sessions

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Rental clubs are available upon request for a nominal fee and can be reserved in advance.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a snack bar on-site, but BYOB policies are not explicitly mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The exact time for 18 holes in the simulator is not specified, but typical sessions range from 1-2 hours depending on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers junior golf clinics and programs specifically designed for youth golfers.
